title: Crash related to data types and `super.new` call
body:
I have some internal crashes during compilation for code that otherwise runs and compiles. I run multiple tests against the source code, but about 5 of the tests end in an internal error. I can't figure out a pattern either.

I get something like the following:

```
- V3Ast.cpp:1215:     Dumping obj_dir/Vtestrunner_012_width.tree
- V3Width.cpp:7477:   widthCommit: 
- V3Const.cpp:3751:   constifyAllLive: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1215:     Dumping obj_dir/Vtestrunner_014_const.tree
%Error: Internal Error: /home/tudor/projects/github/svunit/svunit/svunit_base/svunit_testcase.sv:95:9: ../V3Broken.cpp:186: No dtype on node with hasDType(): NEW 'new'
                                                                                                     : ... In instance testrunner.___05Fts
-node: NEW 0x1d65aa0 <e15144> {o95aj} @dt=0@  new pkg=0x1d5bfa0 -> FUNC 0x1d5d0b0 <e20815> {n56ax} @dt=0x1cae740@(w0)void  new [METHOD]
   95 |   super.new(name);
      |         ^~~
                        /home/tudor/projects/github/svunit/svunit/svunit_base/svunit_base.sv:86:1: ... note: In file included from svunit_base.sv
                        /home/tudor/projects/github/svunit/svunit/svunit_base/svunit_string_utils.svh:25:1: ... note: In file included from svunit_string_utils.svh
                        /home/tudor/projects/github/svunit/svunit/svunit_base/svunit_types.svh:31:47: ... note: In file included from svunit_types.svh
                        /home/tudor/projects/github/svunit/svunit/svunit_base/svunit_pkg.sv:25:60: ... note: In file included from svunit_pkg.sv
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
- V3Ast.cpp:1215:     Dumping obj_dir/Vtestrunner_990_final.tree
- V3Broken.cpp:330:   Broken called under broken, skipping recursion.
- V3StatsReport.cpp:226:statsReport: 
%Error: Internal Error: Aborting since under --debug
%Error: export VERILATOR_ROOT=
%Error: ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec /opt/verilator/v5.008-143-gcac634d39/bin/verilator_bin_dbg --debug --binary --top-module testrunner -f .svunit.f +define+SVUNIT_VERSION=unreleased
```

The code mentioned in the error message is legal SystemVerilog code. It compiles in all big 3 simulators and it also compiles in Verilator. It's just some regular constructor calling a `super.new()`.

Any pointers on how to debug this?
